title: rubus siyuanensis
intro: Rubus siyuanensis, also known as Siyuan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Rubus siyuanensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestive health. Rubus siyuanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
